news-korea-econ.title: Trump beat back anti-family taxes in 2025. Here’s what needs to happen next
news-korea-econ.description: The One Big Beautiful Bill expands the Child Tax Credit to $2,500 per child and creates Trump Accounts to build generational wealth for families.

news-global-econ.title: Dollar flips to losses after Trump says Iran wants a deal
news-global-econ.description: Shipments of oil and gas through the Strait of Hormuz remain in focus as the lack of an agreement threatens to deepen a global energy shock; Oil prices are hovering near $100 a barrel

news-global-econ.title: Los Angeles hotel industry 'struggling' under wage mandate signed by Mayor Karen Bass, new survey finds
news-global-econ.description: An industry research report claims Los Angeles' minimum wage mandate led to reduced hiring, labor hour cuts, and delayed hotel development as costs outpace revenue growth.

news-global-econ.description:
The Strait of Hormuz in the Middle East is hardly the only waterway on President Donald Trump’s mind worldwide at the moment.

news-global-econ.title: DoorDash driver hails key Trump policy after delivering McDonald's to White House: 'I'm going to enjoy it'
news-global-econ.description: DoorDash driver Sharron Simmons says she hopes Trump's no-tax-on-tips benefit in the One Big Beautiful Bill extends beyond its current 2028 expiration.

news-global-econ.title: Sunny Hostin doesn't know if president is the 'right position' for Harris, urges her to reconsider CA governor
news-global-econ.description: "The View" co-host Sunny Hostin said she wanted Kamala Harris to reconsider running for California governor, though co-host Ana Navarro noted the deadline passed for entering the race.

news-global-soc.title: Anthropic hires Trump-linked lobbying firm Ballard Partners
news-global-soc.description: Ballard Partners disclosed it was hired to do advocacy “regarding DOW procurement.” DOW stands for Department of War, the Trump administration’s moniker for the Department of Defence

news-global-soc.title: Xi says world order ‘crumbling into disarray’ as Iran war drags on
news-global-soc.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping touted shared principles with Spain to counter global disorder during an official visit by Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez, which comes after both sides have criticized US-Israeli attacks on Iran and called for peace.
